name: Learn Out Loud
overview: Kelas Internasional (English: International Class) is an Indonesian sitcom based on the 1970s British sitcom Mind Your Language. It revolves around someone who teaches a Bahasa Indonesia class composing of students from many different countries. It is aired every day at 5:00 P.M. It has been aired in three seasons, the first from 18 June 2015 to 16 March 2016, the second from 28 March 2016 to 19 August 2016, and the third since 22 August 2016 to 17 February 2017.

trailers.title: Kelas Internasional - Episode 92 - Kelas Media Unik Part 2/3
